questions.q: What command creates a Python virtual environment?
questions.qZh: 什么命令创建Python虚拟环境？

options: The AI wants to call a function

questions.q: What is the purpose of a system prompt?
questions.qZh: 系统提示的作用是什么？
options: To set the AI's behavior and personality

questions.q: What format describes tool input parameters?
questions.qZh: 什么格式描述工具输入参数？

questions.q: How do you send conversation history to Claude?
questions.qZh: 如何将对话历史发送给Claude？
options: As a messages array with role/content pairs
Showing partial results as they generate

questions.q: What happens after Claude returns a tool_use response?
questions.qZh: Claude返回tool_use响应后会发生什么？
options: You execute the tool and send the result back

questions.q: Which Python feature lets you write 'name is {name}'?

options: Downloads the Python SDK for calling Claude's API

challenges.instruction: Build a basic Claude API call that sends a user message
challenges.instructionZh: 构建一个发送用户消息的基本Claude API调用

challenges.instruction: Add a system prompt to tell Claude it's a helpful coding assistant
challenges.instructionZh: 添加系统提示，告诉Claude它是一个有用的编程助手
parts: system="You are a helpful coding assistant.",
"content": "How do I read a file in Python?"}]
correct: system="You are a helpful coding assistant.",
